message.content:
@startuml
title UML Diagram: DataType CorrespondenceDefinition in Context

' Define the main data type
class "CorrespondenceDefinition" as CD {
    commonality : InternationalString
    commonalityCode : ControlledVocabularyEntry
    difference : InternationalString
    matching : MatchingCriterion
}

' Define the classes that use CorrespondenceDefinition
class "CollectionsPattern::Map" as CP {
    correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
}

class "Conceptual::ConceptMap" as CM {
    correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
    displayLabel : LabelForDisplay
    identifier : Identifier
    usage : InternationalString
    validDates : DateRange
}

class "FormatDescription::InstanceVariableMap" as FM {
    comparison : ComparisonOperator
    correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
    identifier : Identifier
    setValue : String
}

' Define the relationships
CP ..> CD : uses
CM ..> CD : uses
FM ..> CD : uses

' Add hints box
note right of CD
    Hints
    - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
    - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
    - The use of the data type is represented here by a dotted line (not formal UML).
end note

' Add footer
footer DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 - StructuredDataTypes::CorrespondenceDefinition

@enduml
